title: ReachDisplay
description: A little number under your crosshair that tells you hit distance. Train your pvp distancing/reach/spacing.
body:
A little pvp training utility mod.
This mod is a lightweight utility mod to aide in your pvp training. Use this to train your distancing (aka. hit distance, spacing, hit reach) during pvp.

It puts a little number under your crosshair to tell you the distance of every hit you make upon an entity. THIS IS THE REAL HIT DISTANCE. NOT THE DISTANCE BETWEEN YOU AND THE TARGET. Its calculated by taking the distance from the position of your eyes, which is in the middle of the front surface of your head, to the position of the point in space where your line of sight intersects with the target hitbox.

Tip: teh hitbox is square and doesnt rotate meaning you actually get more reach if you strafe and hit the opponent at the corner of their hitbox. 

If the distance is under 3 blocks, the number turns yellow to let you know you hit them. If the distance is over 3 blocks, the number turns red to let you know you missed. Also the number rounds down a little bit, so the farthest you can be and hit them is 2.99 blocks away according to this mod. 3.0 is a miss.



Contact: if you wanna talk to me for some reason, message me on discord at afriend2868
